# Product Vision & Long-Term Roadmap

An integrated personal operating system mapping physical training, biometric recovery, injury management, and cognitive load into a unified structural status engine.

---

## 🗺️ Execution Phases

### Phase 1 — The Structural Foundation (Current)

_Target: High-fidelity tracking of lifting, routine management, and baseline local data persistence._

- [x] Core Local Storage state engine & seed data.
- [ ] Automated muscle group time-decay calculation.
- [ ] Interactive front/back muscle heatmap (UFC-style status view).
- [ ] Gym floor logger with historical pre-fills.

### Phase 2 — Endurance & Holistic Movement (The Strava Layer)

_Target: Expanding out of the gym. Blending cardio metrics with mechanical muscle strain._

- [ ] Cardio tracking core (Running, Cycling, Walking).
- [ ] Cross-discipline fatigue mapping (e.g., A heavy run colors the "Quads/Calves" heatmap red to prevent counter-productive squat sessions).
- [ ] Integration preparation for Health APIs (Apple Health / Huawei Health wrappers) to ingest passive step and sleep data.
- [ ] Personal Best (PB) tracker tracking historical strength and cardio milestones.

### Phase 3 — The Durability & Prehab Engine (The Mobility Layer)

_Target: Addressing pain points, injury management, and rehabilitation loops._

- [ ] **Skeleton Injury Map:** Alternative structural SVG overlay for user-defined chronic/acute injury points (e.g., Lower Back, Left Knee).
- [ ] Daily Subjective Pain & Mobility Check-in (Scale 1–10).
- [ ] **Recovery Session Protocols:** Dedicated tracking for stretching, yoga, and physical therapy sessions.
- [ ] Recovery feedback loops (Successfully completing a mobility session applies a temporary cooling/recovery modifier to affected injury zones).

### Phase 4 — Life Load & Cognitive Capacity (The Wellbeing Layer)

_Target: Tracking subjective systemic load to predict and mitigate ADHD burnout windows._

- [ ] **Daily Life-Load Tracker:** Simplified sliders for Overtime Hours, Social Exposure, and Screen Time.
- [ ] **Vice & Fuel Audit:** Fast tracking for context variables (Alcohol, Cigarettes/Weed, Greasy Food vs. Clean Nutrition).
- [ ] **Mental Health Indexing:** Fast tracking for qualitative states (Anxiety, Stress, Mood, Sleep Shortfalls).
- [ ] **Trend Analysis Matrix:** Correlation graphs mapping when drop-offs in mobility routines directly intersect with spikes in work overtime or poor sleep.

### Phase 5 — Fuel & Consumables (The Nutrition Layer)

_Target: Lightweight, frictionless thermodynamic tracking without macro-counting obsession._

- [ ] Minimalist Calorie & Weight Logger (Bulk / Cut / Maintenance trajectory targets).
- [ ] Intolerance Toggles (Gluten / Lactose load tracking to map digestive inflammation alongside physical fatigue).
